notes:
Game seems run out of the box perfectly. There's sound, but no music. I'm not sure if there's music in the game by design.

However there's an issue with the Slitherine launcher: clicking on the background of the launcher forces mouse control away from you, you can't click away from the background. Only option at that point is ALT+F4 to close the Wine Window. 

So beware: only click interface buttons, not the background of the launcher.
My gold rating is for the Slitherine launcher issue, and because I'm unsure if there is meant to be music or not.
title: Carrier Deck

notes: Visuals had some troubles but ended working perfectly after using PROTON_NO_D3D11. Background music is playing fine. The launcher does have some troubles, be sure to click the buttons and not anywhere else.
title: Carrier Deck

notes: Works flawlessly after updating NVIDIA driver to 418.30.
title: Carrier Deck

notes: Seems to run perfectly out of the box. Did not notice any issues.
